title: ERCOT Shadow Prices SCED CSV download
description:
The report for Shadow Prices of binding/violated constraints in SCED. The report shows the contingency name,
overloaded element details (element name, from/to station name and kV level), Shadow Price ( price for resolving
one MW of the constraint), Penalty for violating the constraint (MaxShadow Price), overloaded element limit and
flow (value)pairs that caused such constraint.

Data released every 1 hour.
